name: mahimairaja--envoic
description: Scan, audit, and clean up Python virtual environments (.venv, conda), node_modules, and development artifacts consuming disk space. Use when the user mentions disk space, environment cleanup, stale venvs, node_modules bloat, project cleanup, broken environments, dangling symlinks, or asks about disk usage from development tools. Also use when encountering ENOSPC errors, slow installs from cache bloat, or when onboarding into a project and needing to verify environment health.
